<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"delete_certificate","description":"Specifies the operation being performed, in this case, deleting saved certificates."},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123","description":"A unique identifier for the request, allowing tracking and debugging of the operation."},"certificateInfo":{"title":"certificateInfo","x-stoplight":{"id":"d98c7f20315ac"},"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","example":"test_soti","description":"Name of the certificate, If certificate name not provided, then we will delete all the previously installed certificate of matching type."},"type":{"type":"string","example":"client","description":"Different types of supported certificate.","enum":["server","client","mqtt","wifi","filestore"]}},"required":["type"]}}},"examples":{"Delete wifi ca cert":{"description":"Payload to delete a WiFi CA certificate from the device","value":{"command":"delete_certificate","requestId":"abc123","certificateInfo":{"name":"ca_cert","type":"wifi"}}},"Delete mqtt client cert":{"description":"Payload to delete an MQTT client certificate from the device","value":{"command":"delete_certificate","requestId":"abc123","certificateInfo":{"name":"client_cert","type":"mqtt"}}},"Delete filestore ca cert":{"description":"Payload to delete a filestore CA certificate from the device","value":{"command":"delete_certificate","requestId":"abc123","certificateInfo":{"name":"ca_cert","type":"filestore"}}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

SSID not found |\n| 16 | WIFI Error - Cannot delete active SSID |\n| 17 | WIFI Error - SSID missed |\n| 18 | WIFI Error - SSID already exist |\n| 19 | WIFI Error - SSID count overflow |\n| 20 | Wifi is not supported |\n| 21 | Certificate not found |\n| 22 | Advanced configuration not set |\n| 23 | Invalid enum value |\n| 24 | Max 32 prefilters limit exceeded |\n| 25 | Max 3 publish topics exceeded |\n| 26 | Max 1 subscribe topic exceeded |\n| 27 | Invalid tenant ID length |\n| 28 | Tag match pattern length exceeded |\n| 29 | Url missing for HTTP source |\n| 30 | Certificate content missing for direct source |","minimum":0,"maximum":30},"description":{"type":"string","description":"response description in detail","example":"Success"}},"required":["code","description"]}},"required":["command","requestId","apiVersion","response"]},"examples":{"example1":{"value":{"command":"delete_certificate","requestId":"abc123","apiVersion":"V1.1","response":{"code":0,"description":"Success"}}}}}}}}}
